briefing: Good morning, Tel Aviv! Today's shaping up hot and dry with a high of 88°F and a low of 75°F — perfect beach weather, 0% chance of rain. Heads up that temps creep up slightly over the next couple days, hitting 90°F by Thursday, so stay hydrated and keep the sunscreen handy!

hebrew.meaning: lehitragel - to get used to, to adapt
hebrew.example: אני מתרגל לחיים החדשים בישראל. (I am getting used to the new life in Israel.)
hebrew.illustration:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="w2026-07-21_bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#AEEBCB"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#6FCF97"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="w2026-07-21_body" cx="0.4" cy="0.3" r="0.8">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#8FE3A0"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#4FB878"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect x="8" y="8" width="184" height="184" rx="32" fill="url(#w2026-07-21_bg)"/>

  <!-- leaf backdrop showing environment to adapt to -->
  <ellipse cx="100" cy="150" rx="70" ry="30" fill="#5FAE7E" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- tail curl -->
  <path d="M60 140 Q35 130 45 105 Q52 90 68 98" stroke="#4FB878" stroke-width="10" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- legs -->
  <path d="M85 145 Q80 158 70 160" stroke="#4FB878" stroke-width="8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M130 140 Q140 152 150 152" stroke="#4FB878" stroke-width="8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- body -->
  <ellipse cx="105" cy="115" rx="45" ry="34" fill="url(#w2026-07-21_body)"/>

  <!-- color-adapting spots -->
  <circle cx="85" cy="118" r="7" fill="#F6D976" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="120" cy="130" r="6" fill="#F6D976" opacity="0.85"/>

  <!-- head -->
  <circle cx="140" cy="90" r="26" fill="url(#w2026-07-21_body)"/>

  <!-- eye white + pupil -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="80" r="10" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
  <circle cx="152" cy="80" r="5" fill="#2B2B2B"/>

  <!-- smile -->
  <path d="M132 96 Q142 104 152 97" stroke="#2B2B2B" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- little crest -->
  <path d="M128 65 Q136 55 145 63" stroke="#3C9A63" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- adaptation sparkle lines -->
  <path d="M45 55 L55 55" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M40 68 L48 68" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
</svg>
